name: Telnyx
description: Telnyx Programmable Voice, Conferences, Recordings, Call Control Applications, Queues, and Phone Numbers API. Use it to search and order EU numbers, build IVRs, control live calls, stream media to AI agents, record calls, and add supervisors for monitor/whisper/barge workflows.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Telnyx API key with Voice API and Numbers permissions.

credential_fields.name: connection_id
credential_fields.label: Default Call Control Application ID
credential_fields.description: Optional default Telnyx Call Control Application / connection ID to copy into call tools.

credential_fields.name: public_key
credential_fields.label: Webhook Public Key
credential_fields.description: Optional Telnyx Ed25519 public key. Add it to enable cryptographic webhook verification for inbound calls.

credential_fields.name: phone_number
credential_fields.label: Default From Number
credential_fields.description: Optional default Telnyx phone number to call from, in E.164 format.

events.name: call.dtmf.received
events.description: DTMF digits were received on a call.

events.name: call.streaming.started
events.description: Media streaming started on a call.

events.name: call.streaming.stopped
events.description: Media streaming stopped on a call.

events.name: call.transcription
events.description: A call transcription event was emitted.

tools.name: search_available_phone_numbers
tools.description: Search Telnyx inventory for numbers that can be ordered. Use filter[country_code]=FR or ES and filter[phone_number_type]=local/national/mobile/toll_free where available.

filter[country_code].description: ISO country code, e.g. FR or ES.

filter[features].description: Features such as voice, sms, mms where supported.

filter[national_destination_code].description: Area/prefix code, e.g. 1 for Paris or 91 for Madrid where supported.

tools.name: list_addresses
tools.description: List Telnyx addresses available for regulatory and emergency use.

tools.name: create_address
tools.description: Create and optionally validate a Telnyx address.

tools.name: get_address
tools.description: Retrieve a Telnyx address.

tools.name: list_regulatory_requirements
tools.description: Retrieve phone-number regulatory requirements by country, type, action, number, or requirement group.

tools.name: list_requirement_groups
tools.description: List reusable Telnyx regulatory requirement groups.

tools.name: create_requirement_group
tools.description: Create a reusable Telnyx regulatory requirement group.

tools.name: get_requirement_group
tools.description: Retrieve a Telnyx regulatory requirement group.

tools.name: update_requirement_group
tools.description: Set values on a Telnyx regulatory requirement group.

tools.name: submit_requirement_group
tools.description: Submit a fulfilled Telnyx requirement group for optional pre-approval.

tools.name: upload_document
tools.description: Upload a base64 document for Telnyx regulatory requirements.

tools.name: list_number_orders
tools.description: List number orders.

tools.name: create_number_order
tools.description: Order one or more searched Telnyx phone numbers. Numbers may require a fulfilled requirement group before activation.

tools.name: get_number_order
tools.description: Retrieve a number order.

tools.name: update_number_order
tools.description: Update customer reference or regulatory requirements on a number order.

tools.name: list_phone_numbers
tools.description: List owned Telnyx phone numbers.

tools.name: slim_list_phone_numbers
tools.description: List owned phone numbers with a lighter response.

tools.name: get_phone_number
tools.description: Retrieve an owned phone number.

tools.name: update_phone_number
tools.description: Update number tags, connection, billing group, customer reference, address, HD voice, or external PIN.

tools.name: delete_phone_number
tools.description: Release/delete an owned phone number. Use carefully.

tools.name: get_phone_number_voice_settings
tools.description: Retrieve voice settings for a phone number.

tools.name: update_phone_number_voice_settings
tools.description: Update voice routing/recording/forwarding settings on a phone number.

tools.name: get_phone_number_messaging_settings
tools.description: Retrieve messaging settings for a phone number.

tools.name: update_phone_number_messaging_settings
tools.description: Update messaging profile/product/tags for a phone number.

tools.name: list_phone_number_jobs
tools.description: List batch phone-number jobs.

tools.name: get_phone_number_job
tools.description: Retrieve a batch phone-number job.

tools.name: batch_update_phone_numbers
tools.description: Create a batch job to update phone numbers.

tools.name: batch_delete_phone_numbers
tools.description: Create a batch job to delete/release phone numbers.

tools.name: list_call_control_applications
tools.description: List Call Control Applications. These are the Voice API connections that hold webhook_event_url and call routing settings.

tools.name: create_call_control_application
tools.description: Create a Call Control Application and set the webhook_event_url where Telnyx sends call events.

tools.name: get_call_control_application
tools.description: Retrieve a Call Control Application.

tools.name: update_call_control_application
tools.description: Update a Call Control Application, including webhook_event_url and routing settings.

tools.name: delete_call_control_application
tools.description: Delete a Call Control Application.

tools.name: list_connection_active_calls
tools.description: List active calls for a Call Control Application/connection.

tools.name: dial_call
tools.description: Place an outbound Telnyx call. For live listening, set supervise_call_control_id to the active call leg and supervisor_role to monitor, whisper, or barge.

tools.name: make_call
tools.description: Backward-compatible alias for dial_call. Prefer dial_call in new agents.

tools.name: get_call_status
tools.description: Retrieve current status for an active/recent call by call_control_id.

tools.name: answer_call
tools.description: Answer an inbound call. Can start recording, transcription, and WebSocket media streaming immediately.

tools.name: bridge_call
tools.description: Bridge a source call leg to a target call_control_id.

source_call_control_id.description: Call leg to control; used in the URL path.

call_control_id.description: Target call leg to bridge to; sent in the JSON body as Telnyx expects.

tools.name: update_call_client_state
tools.description: Update client_state copied into later call webhooks.

tools.name: enqueue_call
tools.description: Put a call into a Telnyx queue.

tools.name: leave_queue
tools.description: Remove the call from its queue using the call action.

tools.name: gather_call
tools.description: Gather DTMF or speech input on a call using Telnyx gather.

tools.name: gather_using_speak
tools.description: Speak text/SSML to the call and gather keypad/speech input for IVR menus.

tools.name: gather_using_audio
tools.description: Play an audio URL and gather keypad/speech input for IVR menus.

tools.name: stop_gather
tools.description: Stop an active gather.

tools.name: play_audio
tools.description: Play an MP3/WAV URL to a call leg.

tools.name: stop_audio
tools.description: Stop current/all audio playback on a call.

tools.name: speak_text
tools.description: Use Telnyx TTS to speak text or SSML on a call.

tools.name: send_dtmf
tools.description: Send DTMF digits on a call.

tools.name: start_call_recording
tools.description: Start recording an active call.

tools.name: stop_call_recording
tools.description: Stop a call recording.

tools.name: pause_call_recording
tools.description: Pause a call recording.

tools.name: resume_call_recording
tools.description: Resume a paused call recording.

tools.name: start_streaming
tools.description: Start WebSocket media streaming on an active call, including bidirectional RTP/MP3 modes for AI agents.

tools.name: stop_streaming
tools.description: Stop one or all active media streams on a call.

tools.name: start_transcription
tools.description: Start live call transcription.

tools.name: stop_transcription
tools.description: Stop live call transcription.

tools.name: transfer_call
tools.description: Transfer an active call to another phone number or SIP URI.

tools.name: switch_supervisor_role
tools.description: Change a supervisor call between monitor, whisper, and barge roles.

tools.name: reject_call
tools.description: Reject an inbound ringing call.

tools.name: hangup_call
tools.description: Hang up an active call.

tools.name: update_call
tools.description: Backward-compatible alias for hangup_call. Prefer hangup_call in new agents.

tools.name: list_conferences
tools.description: List Telnyx conferences.

tools.name: create_conference
tools.description: Create a conference from an existing call. Conferences enable monitor/whisper/barge supervisor flows.

tools.name: get_conference
tools.description: Retrieve a conference.

tools.name: list_conference_participants
tools.description: List participants in a conference.

tools.name: get_conference_participant
tools.description: Retrieve a conference participant.

tools.name: update_conference_participant
tools.description: Update participant behavior such as end-on-exit and beeps.

tools.name: join_conference
tools.description: Join an existing call leg to a conference. Set supervisor_role to monitor, whisper, or barge for live listening/coaching.

tools.name: update_conference_supervisor
tools.description: Update a participant's supervisor role in a conference.

tools.name: end_conference
tools.description: End a conference.

tools.name: hold_conference_participants
tools.description: Put one or more conference participants on hold.

tools.name: unhold_conference_participants
tools.description: Remove one or more conference participants from hold.

tools.name: mute_conference_participants
tools.description: Mute one or more conference participants.

tools.name: unmute_conference_participants
tools.description: Unmute one or more conference participants.

tools.name: play_conference_audio
tools.description: Play an audio URL to all or selected conference participants.

tools.name: stop_conference_audio
tools.description: Stop audio playback on all or selected conference participants.

tools.name: speak_conference_text
tools.description: Use Telnyx TTS to speak text/SSML to all or selected conference participants.

tools.name: send_conference_dtmf
tools.description: Send DTMF digits to selected conference participants.

tools.name: start_conference_recording
tools.description: Start recording a conference.

tools.name: stop_conference_recording
tools.description: Stop a conference recording.

tools.name: pause_conference_recording
tools.description: Pause a conference recording.

tools.name: resume_conference_recording
tools.description: Resume a paused conference recording.

tools.name: list_recordings
tools.description: List call recordings.

tools.name: get_recording
tools.description: Retrieve one call recording, including recording URLs when available.

tools.name: delete_recording
tools.description: Delete one call recording.

tools.name: bulk_delete_recordings
tools.description: Delete multiple call recordings by recording IDs.

tools.name: list_queue_calls
tools.description: List calls waiting in a named queue.

tools.name: get_queue_call
tools.description: Retrieve a queued call.

tools.name: update_queue_call
tools.description: Update a queued call.

tools.name: remove_queue_call
tools.description: Force-remove a call from a named queue.
